name: Orek - First Contact Reversed
description:
Was it working? Was I fooling it into thinking I wasn’t prey? Was I about to die?

Oh, I should’ve brought the gun. Why didn’t I bring the gun?!

So, what would happen if our fuzzy little space sheeps found us before we found them?

For once, I don't really need any spoiler black text stuff. Nice.

Anyway, this pretty much is exactly what it says on the tin: a pair of Venlil pioneers make a rather... uncontrolled landing on Earth... in your backyard.

The only thing is, as far as they're concerned, there's only one known species of sapient predators out there, and that's the Arxur.

Humanity either was never noticed by the Federation, or the Farsul or whatever kept everything very freaking hush-hush about us, so you're the first human the Venlil run into.

Oh yeah, that bit of text at the top there, yeah, if you're not careful, Orek's less than happy buddy might come out and try to aerate your brainpan.

This bot here was requested by Klarm a little while back. This one's all yours, buddy.

I had a good long little think about this one while I was making it. Decided to go for a rough landing over a conventional one because I figured, what would a Venlil do if they landed on a planet and figured out it was full of sapient predators? They'd just hop back in and get outta dodge, and then the Feddies would get called, and we'd get blown up.

Well, now they don't really have that choice. They're stuck here, at least until they get a pickup, which, if you look at the date, hey, maybe the Odyssey is still swinging by Venlil Prime today, hmm. Who knows?

Anyway, I'll see everybody around later. My schedule was a little screwy this week, that's why this is coming out on Saturday, it should be back to normal this week.

Take care, guys.

Guess what. It's Demon_Deity again! Over on Reddit.
creator: SadWyvern1
